zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Lumley於大約1265年出生時，他的父親Roger Lumley49歲，母親Sibilla Morwick19歲。他和Mary FitzMarmaduke至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1338年7月13日在英國諾圖波藍德享年74歲，埋葬在英國諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋。

nameMeanings.name: Lumley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Lumley, a place in County Durham, so named from Old English lum(m) ‘pool’ (see Lum 1) + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

variants.name: Lum
meanings: English: habitational name from Lumb in Lancashire. In some instances the name may be topographic for someone who lived by a pool, Middle English lum(m).
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 林 (see   Lin   1) and 藍 (see   Lan   1), based on their Cantonese pronunciations.

variants.name: Lemley
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of English   Lumley  .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Lumley was born about 1265, his father, Roger Lumley, was 49 and his mother, Sibilla Morwick, was 19. He had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Mary FitzMarmaduke. He died on 13 July 1338, in Northumberland, England, at the age of 74, and was buried in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Lumley est né environ 1265, son père, Roger Lumley, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Sibilla Morwick, avait 19 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Mary FitzMarmaduke. Il est décédé le 13 juillet 1338, à Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterré à Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Lumley um 1265 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Lumley 49 und seine Mutter Sibilla Morwick 19. Er hatte mit Mary FitzMarmaduke mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 13. Juli 1338 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Northumberland, England und wurde in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Lumleyが約1265年に生まれた時，父Roger Lumleyは49歳，母Sibilla Morwickは19歳であった。彼はMary FitzMarmadukeとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1338年7月13日にイギリスノースウンバーランドで74歳で死去し，イギリスノースウンバーランドニューカストル ウプオン トインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Lumley(이)가 대략 1265년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Lumley(은)는 49세였고, 그의 어머니 Sibilla Morwick(은)는 19세였다. 그는 Mary FitzMarmaduke(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1338년 7월 13일 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Lumley родился около 1265 г., его отцу по имени Roger Lumley было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Sibilla Morwick, 19. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Mary FitzMarmaduke. Он умер 13 июля 1338 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 74 лет и был похоронен в местности нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия.
